name: monata-techlib
description: Bootstrap, install, and validate Monata technology-library resources under MONATA_HOME.

interface.longDescription: Download official PTM model-card resources and the VA-Models BSIM-CMG source subset, generate Monata-compatible techlibs under MONATA_HOME, preserve third-party notices, and verify discovery. Also supports installing local private or offline techlib collections.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap official PTM techlibs into MONATA_HOME.
